title: Docker Volumes Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Docker persistent data storage.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Docker Volumes'?
options: Correctly storing and managing your application's persistent data—such as its database—outside of a container

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using a Docker volume in your containerized project?
options: Ensuring that your application's most valuable asset—its data—remains safe even if its container is stopped or deleted
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
